title: **Filename:** EXPORT_FORMAT
content:
**Filename:** EXPORT_FORMAT_NOTES_TEMPLATE.md

---

### I. | PURPOSE

To standardize the format of all outputs from this system into copy-pasteable, iPhone-friendly notes—one module per section, structured for mobile readability, tagging, and future Notion/GitHub syncing.

---

### II. | MODULE FORMAT TEMPLATE

Each output block follows this structure:

::[MODULE_ID]

Title: [Descriptive Title]
Ref ID: [System Reference ID]
Folder: [Target Archive Folder]
Filename: [Suggested filename.md or .txt]

⸻

I. | PURPOSE
